user.title: Connect to Sadales Tīkls
user.description: Paste your APIKEY from the Sadales Tīkls customer portal at https://e-st.lv → **Data Services**. The key is stored locally and is never shared.

objects.title: Select objects to import
objects.description: Found {active_count} active object(s) on **{customer_name}**. Choose which to import. You can change this later by removing and re-adding the integration.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Sadales Tīkls
reauth_confirm.description: Your APIKEY is no longer accepted. Generate a new one in the Sadales Tīkls customer portal and paste it below.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Sadales Tīkls API. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.rate_limited: Sadales Tīkls is rate-limiting requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error talking to Sadales Tīkls.

abort.already_configured: This Sadales Tīkls account is already configured.
abort.no_active_objects: No active objects were found on this account.
abort.reauth_account_mismatch: The new APIKEY belongs to a different Sadales Tīkls customer than this entry. Remove this entry and add a new one instead.

init.title: Sadales Tīkls options
init.description: Tune how often consumption data is fetched and which value (raw vs billing) is recorded.

data_description.update_interval_min: How often to poll for new hourly readings.
data_description.backfill_days: Days of history to fetch when the integration first loads (or after raising this value).
data_description.consumption_field: cVV is the value used for billing (post-corrections). cVR is the raw meter read.
